amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 67 — paragraph 5 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 67 — paragraph 5 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

5 a. The Commission shall adopt guidelines to help national competent authorities to identify and rectify, where necessary, similar problems arising in other AI systems.
parliament_text: 5 a. The Commission shall adopt guidelines to help national competent authorities to identify and rectify, where necessary, similar problems arising in other AI systems.
